reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it includes official Rockstar sources (the GTA VI site and Rockstar Newswire) alongside a result that explicitly states the needed fact: Rockstar confirmed GTA 6 launches as a strictly single-player experience, with no online mode shipping at launch and no confirmed release window for multiplayer.
